ID: カラーグレーディング
Name: Color Grading
Description: Controls post-processing color grading used to alter the overall tone, mood, and visual style of the rendered image. Supports hue, saturation, brightness adjustments, and palette-based color transformations.

Fields.ID: カラーグレーディング有効
Fields.Name: Is Color Grading Enabled
Fields.Description: Enables or disables the color grading effect. When disabled, the scene is rendered using its original color output without grading adjustments.

Fields.Name: Conversion Mode
Fields.Description: Selects the color grading or color space conversion method used during post-processing.

Fields.Name: Hue
Fields.Description: Adjusts the global hue shift of the rendered image, rotating colors around the color spectrum.

Fields.Name: Saturation
Fields.Description: Controls overall color intensity. Higher values produce more vivid colors, while lower values reduce colorfulness toward grayscale.

Fields.Name: Brightness
Fields.Description: Adjusts overall image luminance after color grading is applied.

Fields.Name: Palette File ID
Fields.Description: Specifies the lookup table (LUT) or palette resource used for palette-based color grading transformations.
